prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约25996→25885→27447→34528→43501，呈持续大幅后移趋势，近3年累计后移约16054名；2025年基准位次约43501名，较2024年后移约 8973名，后移幅度显著扩大；该校在重庆市物理类招生计划2021年27人、2022年28人、2023年27人、2024年28人、2025年28人，总体稳定；2026年计划增 至31人，较2025年扩招约10.7%，扩招幅度较大，预计使竞争略有加剧，位次进一步后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名约第120名 （2026年），近年排名在116–122名之间小幅波动，整体层次稳定；该校近年声誉平稳，未出现明显负面舆情或投档异常信号；抖音热度排名第95位，评价为「 一般」，短视频平台关注度不高，对报考热度影响有限；第五轮学科评估中，食品科学与工程获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的食品科学与工 程类直接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等热门专业社会热度持续偏高，但该校相关专业（计算 机类等）录取位次远优于校线，对整体位次拉动有限；食品科学与工程类所属的「生化环材」大类2024年评估为「一般观望」，热度有所回暖但仍非热门。重庆市2026年物理类考 生总数约13.69万人，较2025年（13.95万）减少约1.85%，竞争略有缓和；东北农业大学位于黑龙江省哈尔滨市，属东北地区高 校；重庆考生对东北高校存在一定地域偏好差异，跨省就读意愿相对较弱，对报考热度有轻微抑制作用。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续大幅后移趋势、2026年扩招约10.7% 加剧竞争、考生总数小幅减少略有对冲、学校声誉平稳、地域偏好偏弱等因素，在2025年基准位次43501名基础上，预计2026年最低位次继续后移。预测最低位次约46097名，区间 45597–46597名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 25996 → 25885 → 27447 → 34528 → 43501, showing a continuous and significant backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 16054 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 43501, a backward shift of about 8973 places compared to 2024, with a notably enlarged magnitude; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing was 27 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 27 in 2023, 28 in 2024, and 28 in 2025, overall stable; the 2026 plan increases to 31, an expansion of about 10.7% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, expected to slightly intensify competition and further shift the ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Agricultural University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking is about 120th (2026), with slight fluctuations between 116–122 in recent years, overall stable; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or abnormal admission signals; its Douyin popularity ranking is 95th, rated as 'average', with low attention on short video platforms, having limited impact on application heat; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Food Science and Engineering received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering category in the enrollment majors, attracting some interest in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to have high social heat, but the admission rankings for these majors (e.g., Computer Science) at this university are far better than the school line, with limited pull on overall ranking; the Food Science and Engineering category, part of the 'Biology, Chemistry, Environment, Materials' group, was assessed as 'average wait-and-see' in 2024, with some warming but still not hot. In 2026, the total number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing is about 136,900, a decrease of about 1.85% from 2025 (139,500), slightly easing competition; Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, a university in the Northeast region; Chongqing examinees have certain regional preference differences towards Northeast universities, with relatively weaker willingness to study across provinces, slightly suppressing application heat.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous and significant backward trend of historical rankings, the expansion of about 10.7% in 2026 intensifying competition, the slight decrease in total examinees providing some offset, stable university reputation, and weak regional preference, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 43501, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to continue shifting backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 46097, with a range of 45597–46597.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 46097, range 45597–46597. If the ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice (Food Science and Engineering is the university's flagship A- discipline, Water Resources and Energy and Power have stable employment), Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Biological Science Bachelor-Master-PhD program) can be used as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Animal Production, Plant Production, Civil Engineering, etc.) as a safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range, focus on sprinting for popular majors like Computer Science.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 5528 → 5106 → 5522 → 4833 → 4750, showing a fluctuating but slightly forward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 772 places in the last two years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 4750, the best in the past five years.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Chongqing was 7 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 6 in 2024, and 6 in 2025; the plan for 2026 increases to 8, an expansion of about 33.3% compared to 2025, a significant expansion, which is expected to intensify competition and shift the ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 120th in the Soft Science main ranking (2026), with stable level; the university's reputation has been stable in recent years, with no negative public opinion or abnormal admission records; Douyin popularity is average, with limited impact on History Category applications; Food Science and Engineering is rated A-, but the History Category enrollment majors (Finance, Business Administration, Public Administration) are not directly related to this discipline, so the advantage of the strong discipline has limited appeal to History Category.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance majors have a 'differentiated wait-and-see' social popularity, with finance-related majors overall cooling down; Business Administration majors are 'clearly discouraged'; Public Administration popularity is stable. The total number of History Category examinees in Chongqing in 2026 is about 72,100, a decrease of about 1.73% from 2025 (73,400), slightly easing competition; Northeast universities have weak regional preference among Chongqing examinees, with low willingness to study across provinces, slightly suppressing application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating but slightly forward trend of historical rankings, the significant 33.3% expansion in 2026 intensifying competition, the slight offset from the small decrease in total examinees, the weak correlation between History Category enrollment majors and the university's strong disciplines, and the weak regional preference, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 4750, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to shift backward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 5600, with a range of 5100–6100.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Finance (including Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- Business Administration (including Business Administration, Accounting, Marketing, Human Resource Management).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 5600, range 5100–6100. History Category only has 2 enrollment majors (Finance, Business Administration), with small tier differences. If ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to prioritize Finance as the main choice, followed by Business Administration; if ranking is significantly above the upper limit, you can aim for Finance; if ranking is close to the lower limit, use Public Administration as a safety choice.
